title: springy oven-roasted Turkish sausage Pide
description: a flavorful and satisfying Turkish dish featuring springy sausage and crispy pide dough, perfect for a solo dinner

ingredients.name: Turkish sausage (4)
ingredients.notes: look for a brand with a high parsley and herbs content

instructions: in a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, and salt.
gradually add warm water, mixing until a shaggy dough forms.
knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
divide the dough into 2-4 equal pieces, depending on desired pide size.
roll out each piece into a thin circle.
place 2-3 pieces of sausage in the center of each circle, leaving a 1-inch border around the edge.
fold the dough over the sausage, pressing the edges to seal.
place the pide on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with black pepper.
bake for 15-20 minutes until golden brown and crispy.
serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice if desired.
optional: serve with a side of mixed greens or a simple salad for a more substantial meal.
